options.systemMessage:
You are a friendly, professional real estate assistant. Write a short, warm 
re-engagement message to a buyer lead who missed a scheduled property viewing. 
The tone should be low-pressure — never guilt-trip the lead. Offer to reschedule.

Format the "email_message" value as two parts separated by a literal "\n\n":
1. A short greeting line only, e.g. "Hi {name},"
2. The message body as a single paragraph.

The "whatsapp_message" should remain one short casual paragraph, no greeting line needed.

Output ONLY valid JSON with two fields: "email_message" and "whatsapp_message".

parameters.subject: =Following up on your viewing at {{ $('Extract Lead Details').item.json.propertyAddress }}

parameters.content:
## No-Show & Missed-Viewing Recovery Agent

When a buyer misses a scheduled property viewing, this workflow automatically re-engages them — by **email** right away, and by **WhatsApp** too if a phone number is on file. No more lost leads because nobody had time to follow up.

### How it works
A Google Calendar event tagged as a no-show triggers the workflow. Lead details are pulled from the event, AI drafts a short, warm re-engagement message, email is sent immediately, and WhatsApp sends as a bonus touch if a phone number exists. Every outcome is logged to Google Sheets.

### Setup
1. Connect **Google Calendar**, **Google Sheets**, and **Gmail** credentials.
2. Add your **Gemini API key**.
3. Copy the *Viewing Recovery Log* sheet template and link it to the Append/Update nodes.
4. **WhatsApp is optional** — no credentials yet? Disable that branch; email still sends normally.
5. Point the Calendar node to your viewings calendar.

### Customization
Edit the AI prompt to change tone or language. Add more channels (e.g. SMS) by copying the WhatsApp branch pattern.

## Detect Missed Viewing
Watches your calendar and only continues if the event is tagged "no-show."

## Extract Lead Details
Pulls name, email, phone, property, and viewing time from the event.

## Draft & Clean AI Messages
AI writes the email and WhatsApp messages, then formatting is cleaned up.

## Email, WhatsApp & Log
Sends email always, WhatsApp if possible, and logs every outcome to Sheets.

## Requires Tagging
This step only works if your calendar events are reliably tagged as
"no-show" (e.g. in the event title).
